expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy returns a synthetic local confirmation URL instead of a real Shopify billing approval URL.
The proxy generates stable session-local one-time purchase IDs.
The proxy returns a synthetic local confirmation URL instead of a real Shopify billing approval URL.
The proxy generates stable session-local one-time purchase IDs.
The proxy uses deterministic session-local timestamps for staged purchases.

notes: Covers one-time app purchase status gating: local-runtime parity expects non-test charges to remain PENDING while test charges stage ACTIVE for local agent flows. Live billing mutation capture remains blocked for the configured conformance custom app by Shopify's `Custom apps cannot use the Billing API` response, so the PENDING non-test expectation is derived from Shopify billing core behavior and protected by focused runtime coverage plus local-runtime parity.
